CHAPTER 12. CONTROLLABLE ELECTRONIC RECORDS

§12-101. Title

            This Chapter may be cited as Uniform Commercial Code—Controllable Electronic Records.

            Acts 2024, No. 773, §1.

CHAPTER 12.  CONTROLLABLE ELECTRONIC RECORDS
§12-101.  Title

Records.
